title: vanda tessellata subsp. tessellata
intro: Vanda tessellata subsp. tessellata, also known as the tessellated Vanda, is an orchid species belonging to the Vanda genus. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where its medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to treat a variety of health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Vanda tessellata subsp. tessellata include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts or infusions, which can be consumed as teas or added to other medicinal concoctions.
